__doc__: SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for the blog post-kind taxonomy. Each kind declares its sidebar `emoji`, a one-line `description`, and an `outline` (the structural elements a post of that kind should contain). A post's emoji reflects its KIND (document type), not its topic, so the Posts sidebar is scannable by type. CONSUMERS: scripts/validate-post-outline.js reads emoji/description/outline from here; the draft-docs plugin reads `emoji` to prepend it to the sidebar label; the validate-post-outline-hook surfaces these on a finding; the <ThoughtKind>/<ThoughtKindLegend> blog-ui components render the kind legends; the 'Start Here' post mirrors the kind->emoji table (drift-checked). THE THOUGHTS-vs-MINDSET MODEL: a THOUGHT is an idea that OCCURRED to me (a /thoughts post). A thought has three graduation paths: act on it -> an /initiatives INITIATIVE; deliberately ADOPT it to shape how I think -> a /mindset MINDSET post; distill it into durable knowledge -> a /craft doc. So two collection flags: `thought: true` + `thoughtGloss` mark the kinds of a /thoughts post (the ideas that occurred to me: idea, simulation, prediction, critique, design-story); `mindset: true` + `mindsetGloss` mark the kinds of a /mindset post (the curated inputs I keep to shape my thinking: question-set, quote-set, principle). A kind is one or the other, never both. LOCKSTEP: to add/change a kind, edit (1) this file, (2) a matching CHECKS entry in validate-post-outline.js if it has a new outline id, (3) the Start Here legend table, (4) the Thoughts legend if `thought: true` / the Mindset legend if `mindset: true`. Mirrors the docs emoji system (scripts/lib/emoji-map.json).

idea.description: An unactioned idea: something I might build or do, captured before I've acted on it. The raw front of the idea-to-ship lifecycle (a /thoughts post; graduates to an /initiatives project when I act on it).
idea.thoughtGloss: Something I might build or do

outline.label: a non-empty `description:` frontmatter (powers the social card + share text)

question-set.description: A set of questions I ask — introspective ('What I Ask Myself') or practical ('Questions for starting a business'). Its own /questions collection: important sets of questions, not all of them mindset-shaping.
question-set.questionGloss: A set of questions I ask

outline.label: themed H2 sections (questions grouped by theme, not a flat list)
one or more <Question> cards (each question is a card, not a bare bullet)
a <SectionBanner> (the per-section "why these questions matter" callout)
a non-empty `description:` frontmatter (powers the social card + share text)

simulation.description: A hypothetical walk-through of how something could unfold: 'if X then Y then Z; what if 1, 2, 3?'. Exploratory branching, no commitment (a /thoughts post). A pre-meditated action is a simulation resolved into 'if I'm ever in X, I will do Y'.
simulation.thoughtGloss: If X then Y then Z; what if 1, 2, 3?

outline.label: a scenario / starting condition (an H2 or bold line stating the 'if X' the walk-through branches from)
the branches or steps it walks (if/then chains, numbered steps, or a decision list)
a non-empty `description:` frontmatter (powers the social card + share text)

prediction.description: A falsifiable bet about the future: 'I think X will happen'. Distinct from a simulation (which explores branches without committing); a prediction calls one outcome so it can be scored later (a /thoughts post).
prediction.thoughtGloss: A falsifiable bet about the future

outline.label: the prediction stated as a falsifiable claim (a bold **Prediction:** line or an H2 stating what will happen)
the reasoning / when it resolves (why I believe it, and how/when I'll know if it was right)
a non-empty `description:` frontmatter (powers the social card + share text)

critique.description: An evaluative thought about something that already exists: what's wrong with X and what I'd change (critique), or how X actually works and what's really going on (analysis) (a /thoughts post).
critique.thoughtGloss: What's wrong with X, or how X really works

outline.label: the subject under critique/analysis (named up front: what is being evaluated)
the assessment (what's wrong / what I'd change, or how it works / what's really going on)
a non-empty `description:` frontmatter (powers the social card + share text)

research.description: Something I want to research or learn before deciding: a systematic investigation I have not run yet (a /thoughts post, carded on the Research board). What must I find out to act on an idea?
research.thoughtGloss: Something I want to research before deciding

outline.label: the questions to investigate (what I need to find out, as a list or H2 sections)
a non-empty `description:` frontmatter (powers the social card + share text)

principle.description: An observation maturing into a rule I live by: 'I noticed X tends to happen' becoming 'so I now always Y'. The raw feeder that graduates UP into a durable /craft framework once it holds (a /thoughts post).
principle.mindsetGloss: An observation I keep as a rule that shapes me

outline.label: the observation (the pattern noticed: 'I noticed that X')
the principle it implies (the rule it suggests living by: 'so I now Y')
a non-empty `description:` frontmatter (powers the social card + share text)

framework.description: A reusable model or framework for thinking about something ('A Framework for', 'The Anatomy of', a maturity model).

outline.label: the framework laid out (numbered steps, an H2-per-stage, or a <DiagramWithFootnotes>/mermaid)
a non-empty `description:` frontmatter (powers the social card + share text)

reflection.description: A personal essay or set of takeaways ('Notes From', 'What X Taught Me').

outline.label: a non-empty `description:` frontmatter (powers the social card + share text)

project.description: A dated build LOG of something I made: what I set out to build, what I did, what I learned. The acted-on end of the idea-to-ship lifecycle (an /initiatives post). Indexed by AREA on the Projects hub via its `area:` frontmatter.

outline.label: a non-empty `description:` frontmatter (powers the social card + share text)

tinkering.description: A dated TINKERING log: exploratory dabbling with a tool, language, or technique ('Tinkering with X') — hands-on experiments, not a finished build (an /initiatives post). Indexed by AREA on the Tinkering hub via its `area:` frontmatter.

outline.label: a non-empty `description:` frontmatter (powers the social card + share text)

quote-set.description: A themed set of quotes that moved me, with my reflection on why ('quotes that moved me', affirmations). A curated Mindset input I keep to shape my thinking; each quote is a component inside a <QuoteSet>: an <EditorialQuote> pull-quote, or a <PosterQuote> cascade for the 'watch your thoughts ... destiny' poster style.
quote-set.mindsetGloss: Quotes that moved me, kept to shape my thinking

outline.label: themed H2 sections (quotes grouped by theme, not a flat list)
one or more quote components inside a <QuoteSet> (<EditorialQuote>/<Quote> pull-quotes or a <PosterQuote> cascade; each quote is a component, not a bare blockquote)
a non-empty `description:` frontmatter (powers the social card + share text)

system-design.description: A full build/architecture write-up that paints the whole picture (a UX mockup + the key decisions).

outline.label: a UX mockup (a <Mockup> in the body, or a `mockups:` frontmatter sidecar link)
a Decisions section (a heading like "Key Decisions" / "Decisions" / "Trade-offs")
a non-empty `description:` frontmatter (powers the social card + share text)

design-story.description: The story/motivation BEHIND a design: a narrative front-door that links to the formal HLD in /designs (not the HLD itself, which lives in /designs).
design-story.thoughtGloss: How X would actually be structured

outline.label: a link to the formal design doc in /designs (a design-story narrates the WHY and points to the HLD; the HLD itself lives in /designs)
a non-empty `description:` frontmatter (powers the social card + share text)

frontend-design.description: A FRONTEND/experience design (a /designs post): UI, interaction, components, visual systems — heroes, the sidebar, mockup-driven surfaces. Structurally a client/render concern (layout, motion, state, a11y), distinct from a service architecture.

outline.label: a UX mockup or visual (a <Mockup>/<Gif> in the body, or a `mockups:` frontmatter sidecar link)
a Decisions section (a heading like "Key Decisions" / "Decisions" / "Trade-offs")
a non-empty `description:` frontmatter (powers the social card + share text)

backend-design.description: A BACKEND/systems design (a /designs post): services, pipelines, data, infra, deploy — the server-side architecture. Structurally a service/data concern (components, flows, storage, failure modes), distinct from a UI design.

outline.label: an architecture view (a diagram, a <DiagramWithFootnotes>, or a components/flow breakdown)
a Decisions section (a heading like "Key Decisions" / "Decisions" / "Trade-offs")
a non-empty `description:` frontmatter (powers the social card + share text)

agent-design.description: An AI/AGENT design (a /designs post): an autonomous or LLM-driven system — the agent loop, tools, prompts, guardrails. Structurally an agent concern (capabilities, control flow, evaluation), distinct from a plain backend service.

outline.label: the agent's loop/capabilities (the control flow, tools, or responsibilities it has)
a Decisions section (a heading like "Key Decisions" / "Decisions" / "Trade-offs")
a non-empty `description:` frontmatter (powers the social card + share text)

tooling-cli-design.description: A TOOLING/CLI/script design (a /designs post): a CLI, generator, build step, or dev tool — often a small drawing/checking/build recipe. Structurally a tool concern (inputs, the transform, the output it produces), distinct from a running service or a UI.

outline.label: the tool's inputs->output (what it consumes, the transform/recipe, and what it produces)
a non-empty `description:` frontmatter (powers the social card + share text)

tutorial.description: A hands-on, learn-by-doing walkthrough ('A Hands-On Way to', 'Teaching X', 'Running X Locally').

outline.label: steps or a runnable artifact (numbered steps, a code fence, a <Walkthrough>, or a <Gif>)
a non-empty `description:` frontmatter (powers the social card + share text)

reference.description: A concept explainer or taxonomy ('A Taxonomy of', 'What Does X Mean').

outline.label: a non-empty `description:` frontmatter (powers the social card + share text)

reading-list.description: A curated, annotated list of external resources on a topic (a reading list / link library / 'Resources for X'): grouped links, each with a one-line note on why it is worth your time. The distilled version of a bookmarks pile.

outline.label: a grouped list of external links, each with a short annotation (why it is worth reading) — not a bare URL dump
a non-empty `description:` frontmatter (powers the social card + share text)

showcase.description: A showcase of one structural ABILITY of the blog: an embeddable component or technique (a card, a diagram, a code embed), demonstrated live, with a 'used in' index of the posts that leverage it. Lives in /legend/components (the site's component reference).

outline.label: a live demonstration of the technique (the component rendered in the body, or a code/usage example showing how to embed it)
a non-empty `description:` frontmatter (powers the social card + share text)

hub.description: A durable /craft HUB: an index page that catalogs temporal /initiatives posts of one activity kind (project/tinkering/research), grouped by AREA, via a generated <Catalog> component. The durable half of the durable-vs-temporal split (a /craft DOC, not a blog post). See the manage-hubs skill.

outline.label: renders a <Catalog> (the generated hub index — a <Catalog kind="…"/> component tag in the body)
a non-empty `description:` frontmatter (powers the social card + share text)

event-recap.description: A recap of a conference or event.

outline.label: a non-empty `description:` frontmatter (powers the social card + share text)

legend.description: A series index or keystone that explains a set of posts and the conventions they share.

outline.label: an explainer of the conventions it indexes (a table, a <PowerLegend>, or a list of links out)
a non-empty `description:` frontmatter (powers the social card + share text)

learning-plan.description: A sequenced plan for learning a topic: the goal, what you need first, an ordered curriculum/milestones, resources, and how you know you're done.

outline.label: a goal/outcome up front (an H2 like "Goal", "Outcome", "What you'll learn", or "Why")
a sequenced curriculum or milestones (numbered steps, an H2-per-stage/module, or a checklist)
a resources section (a "Resources"/"Reading"/"References" heading or a list of links)
a checkpoint / done-criteria (a "Checkpoint", "You're done when", "Assessment", or "Prerequisites" section that bounds the plan)
a non-empty `description:` frontmatter (powers the social card + share text)

experiment-plan.description: The PLAN half of an experiment (an /initiatives experiment post): the hypothesis and the design, before the result is in. Flips to experiment-result 📊 once the Outcome lands.

outline.label: a hypothesis (an H2 like "Hypothesis" / "We believe" / "Prediction", or a bold **Hypothesis:** line)
a design section (an H2 like "Design", "Setup", "Method", "How we'll run it", or "Variants")
a non-empty `description:` frontmatter (powers the social card + share text)

experiment-result.description: The RESULT half of an experiment (an /initiatives experiment post after the data is in): the outcome and the decision. The same post, with its kind flipped from experiment-plan 📝.

outline.label: an outcome/results section (an H2 like "Outcome", "Result", "Results", "Findings", or "What happened")
a Decision section (a heading like "Decision", "Recommendation", or "Trade-offs" — what we'll do given the result)
a non-empty `description:` frontmatter (powers the social card + share text)
